title: Better Vanilla Animations
description: Make all aspects of the game look modern with this vanilla-like modpack
body:
**As you see the pack has been discontinued to focus on other proyects that I recommend checking out as they are similar to this one. [[Here is THE NEW PACK]](https://modrinth.com/modpack/actions-visuals)**



![Full modpack logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07e6ec0791070cfca92c5d7a0ac507a499ed381c.png)
# - Here's the trailer
## <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/pPd9ix1lg7E" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## - What is **BVA**?       
**BVA** (_Better Vanilla Animations_) is modpack for modern versions of minecraft that aims to upgrade the basic animations and texture of the game do a more advanced and refined style.  

**Important: We are currently atempting to port/revamp the modpack for newer versions of minecraft and we also want to focus more on vfx and sfx since the animation part of the pack is mostly already done. **
<details>
<summary>FAQ</summary>

### - Shader compatibility                          
Shaders like **Complentary reimagined** or **BSL** are supported for the modpack due to the ammount of customization that they offer. Other shaders might not suppor the animations that this mods and texturepacks offer so it is not recommended to use any external shaders.

### - Updating the pack
We are currently working on a new version for 1.21 that adds new features like [REDACTED]
and we are also working on porting the modpack to 1.21.4 or 1.21.5 which comes with _new texturing features_. So be patient and please bare with us.

</details>
